platform.thesis: If Bloomberg runs public markets, ANAVI will run private ones.

intermediaries.headline: Intermediaries Per Deal
intermediaries.body: 5 to 15 intermediaries per deal. Each extracting 1–5%. The originator — the person whose relationship made the deal possible — receives no attribution, no compounding value, and no protection if they're cut out.

fraud.headline: Annual Fraud Losses
fraud.body: $10 to $40 billion in annual US investment fraud losses. Because identity verification across private markets is fragmented, unshared, and trivially forged. Everyone runs their own checks. No one shares the results.

compliance.headline: Per-Deal Compliance Cost
compliance.body: $200,000 to $500,000 per deal spent on KYC/KYB/AML compliance. Duplicated across every participant. No shared verification, no shared trust.
